prompts.name: Casual Chic
prompts.text: Style the outfit as casual chic with simple modern pieces, tasteful coordination, and effortless polish.

prompts.name: Layered Streetwear
prompts.text: Style the outfit with layered streetwear pieces, strong silhouette, urban details, and confident personality.

prompts.name: Soft Girl
prompts.text: Style the outfit with soft colors, gentle accessories, cute textures, and a sweet approachable mood.

prompts.name: Gothic Lolita
prompts.text: Style the outfit with gothic lolita influence, layered frills, lace, bows, dark elegance, and careful balance.

prompts.name: Elegant Formal
prompts.text: Style the outfit as elegant formalwear with refined tailoring, graceful fabric, and polished presentation.

prompts.name: Academia
prompts.text: Style the outfit with academia influence, neat layers, muted colors, classic shoes, books, and scholarly charm.

prompts.name: Bohemian
prompts.text: Style the outfit with bohemian influence, flowing fabrics, earthy tones, handmade accessories, and relaxed artistic charm.

prompts.name: Techwear
prompts.text: Style the outfit with techwear influence, functional layers, straps, sleek fabric, and futuristic practicality.

prompts.name: Pastel Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with pastel colors, soft shapes, cute accessories, and gentle visual sweetness.

prompts.name: Punk Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with punk influence, bold accessories, dark fabric, metal details, and rebellious energy.

prompts.name: Royal Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with royal elegance, luxurious fabrics, ornate decoration, and noble posture.

prompts.name: Fairycore
prompts.text: Style the outfit with fairycore influence, soft natural colors, delicate accessories, floral details, and magical lightness.

prompts.name: Cyber Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with futuristic cyber fashion, glossy materials, glowing accents, and sleek geometric design.

prompts.name: Layered Winter Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with warm winter layers, cozy textures, scarves, coats, and seasonal comfort.

prompts.name: Light Summer Fashion
prompts.text: Style the outfit with lightweight summer clothing, breathable fabrics, bright colors, and relaxed sunny energy.
